---
name: Agent improvement
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing agent
title: "Improve <agent-name>: <short description>"
labels: improvement
assignees: mcleo-d
---

## Agent

<!-- Which agent file does this affect? e.g. qa-engineer.md -->

## Type of improvement

- [ ] Missing domain knowledge (the agent lacks depth in an area it should cover)
- [ ] Missing interaction model relationship (a coordination link that should exist doesn't)
- [ ] Outdated technology or standard (a tool, version, or practice is no longer current)
- [ ] Principle adaptation (a core principle is generic rather than genuinely adapted to the domain)
- [ ] Security deference gap (the agent makes security decisions it should escalate)
- [ ] Accessibility gap (the agent doesn't adequately address accessibility in its domain)
- [ ] Other

## Current behaviour

<!-- What does the agent currently do or say that should change? Quote the relevant section if helpful. -->

## Proposed improvement

<!-- What should it do instead, or what should be added? -->

## Rationale

<!-- Why is this a gap? What real-world consequence does the current wording lead to? -->

## Impact on other agents

<!-- Does this change require corresponding updates to any other agent's interaction model? If so, which ones? -->

## Are you willing to submit a PR?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No, I'm raising this for discussion only
